metaDescription: Join the HR partner program and grow your business with us.

hero.heading: Become a Partner
hero.subheading: Grow your business by partnering with HR. Competitive commissions and full partner support.

why.title: Why Partner With Us?
why.subheading: Join a growing ecosystem and build a recurring revenue stream.

revenue.title: Recurring Revenue
revenue.description: Earn competitive commissions on every customer you refer or resell.

training.title: Partner Training
training.description: Comprehensive onboarding, certification programs, and ongoing product education.

coMarketing.title: Co-Marketing
coMarketing.description: Joint campaigns, co-branded materials, events, and shared lead generation.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: Your own partner manager, priority technical support, and sales enablement resources.

types.title: Partner Types
types.subheading: Choose the partnership model that fits your business.

referral.title: Referral Partner
referral.description: Refer customers and earn a commission on every successful deal.

reseller.title: Reseller Partner
reseller.description: Resell HR under your own brand with custom pricing.

integration.title: Integration Partner
integration.description: Build a native integration with HR and reach our customer base.

technology.title: Technology Partner
technology.description: Deeper technical collaboration to build joint solutions.

current.title: Current Partners
current.subheading: Trusted by leading companies in HR tech.

form.title: Apply to Partner
form.description: Tell us about your business and we'll be in touch within 2 business days.
form.agreement: I agree to the partner program terms and conditions
form.successMessage: Thank you for your interest in partnering with HR. Our team will review your application and get back to you within 2 business days.

contact.title: Have Questions?
contact.description: Our partnership team is here to help.
